name: SideSheet
description: Off-canvas content column anchored to the leading or trailing edge of the viewport. Pairs with BottomSheet as the Sheet family's other anchor: BottomSheet for committed-sheet flows, SideSheet for off-canvas navigation columns, settings panes, channel directories, filter rails. The composition is free-form — the canonical fill is a Header (size="medium") column heading + a List (variant="thumbnail" density="compact") body, optionally followed by another Header + List pair and a pinned footer commit.
